data.title: Qatar National Bank launches its tokenized QCD market fund
data.description:
QNB Group (Qatar National Bank), along with other partners have officially launched a tokenized money market fund, called the QCD Money Market Fund (QCDT).
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/qatar-national-bank-tokenized-qcd-fund/

data.title: Bank of England Maintains Policy Rate at 4.00%
data.description: According to PANews, the Bank of England has decided to keep its policy interest rate steady at 4.00%, aligning with market expectations. The decision saw seven members voting in favor of maintaining the current rate, while two members voted for a rate cut.

data.title: CZ: BNB has grown 10,000 times from $0.1 to $1,000 in 8 years. This is just the beginning.
data.description: As the price of BNB broke through $1,000, Binance founder CZ was overwhelmed with emotion. He first posted on the X platform, saying: "Watching BNB rise from the ICO price of $0.10 eight years ago to $1,000 today is beyond words. I don't represent any entity or title, just as a BNB community member and BNB holder, I thank everyone in the BNB and crypto ecosystem for their support. We have encountered challenges along the way, but we work hard, we build, and we persevere. This is truly a community effort! This is just the beginning. Let's move towards the next 10,000x together!" He then retweeted his previous article, saying: "Back to this article I wrote 3,000 days ago, when we completed the ICO on July 2, 2017. 10,000x in 3,000 days. Persevere!"

data.title: Binance Wallet's TGE event will feature JoJo World (JOJO)
data.description: Binance Wallet will exclusively host the 38th TGE from 5:00 PM to 7:00 PM (UTC+8) on September 19, 2025, to list the JoJo World (JOJO) token. Eligible users must use Binance Alpha Points to participate. Additionally, 32 million JOJO tokens will be allocated for future activities, details of which will be announced separately. TGE details and the event page will be released soon.

data.title: Maelstrom, Animoca back Bio Protocol’s bid to unite AI, biotech, crypto
data.description:
Bio Protocol secured $6. 9 million in funding from Maelstrom Fund, Animoca Brands and other investors to advance science using AI and crypto.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/maelstrom-animoca-back-protocol-s-bid-to-unite-ai-biotech-and-crypto?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: CZ sounds alarm as ‘SEAL’ team uncovers 60 fake IT workers linked to North Korea
data.description:
Changpeng Zhao warned about North Korean hackers after the white hat SEAL team uncovered the profiles and fake names of 60 impersonators.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/cz-crypto-seal-60-north-korean-hackers?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Upbit to launch BARD trading pairs against BTC and USDT
data.description: According to official news, Upbit will launch BARD Korean Won, BTC and USDT trading pairs.

data.title: BNB Hits Historic $1,000 Milestone – Analysts Predict Further Gains
data.description:
The milestone comes after weeks of steady gains, with BNB rallying from below $600 in July to its current highs.
source: https://coindoo.com/market/bnb-hits-historic-1000-milestone-analysts-predict-further-gains/

data.title: DBS, Franklin Templeton and Ripple launch trading with tokenized money market funds
data.description:
DBS and Franklin Templeton launch trading and lending solutions with tokenized funds and Ripple’s RLUSD stablecoin. The article DBS, Franklin Templeton and Ripple launch trading with tokenized money market funds was first published on Crypto Valley Journal.
source: https://cryptovalleyjournal.com/hot-topics/news/dbs-franklin-templeton-and-ripple-launch-trading-with-tokenized-money-market-funds/?utm_campaign=rss_reader&utm_medium=rss&utm_source=feed_source&utm_content=DBS%2C+Franklin+Templeton+and+Ripple+launch+trading+with+tokenized+money+market+funds

data.title: ASTER TGE first day data: ASTER token 24-hour trading volume of $345 million, nearly 330,000 new users
data.description: Aster announced on the X platform that the ASTER token's total trading volume exceeded $345 million in the first 24 hours after its launch. The token price continued to rise from $0.03015 after opening, reaching an intraday high of $0.528, a single-day increase of 1,650%. Currently, ASTER only supports spot trading on the Aster DEX, which serves as the sole entry point for funds and users. Within 24 hours, the platform's TVL climbed from $660 million to $1.005 billion, with a total daily trading volume of nearly $1.5 billion and over 330,000 new unique wallet addresses.

data.title: U.S. needs EU more than expected, giving Europe export power
data.description:
The United States leans more on the European Union for imported goods than many assume, and that reliance has deepened over time, according to a new review by Germany’s IW economic institute. The study finds the EU now tops China for both the value and the count of product groups on which U. S. buyers depend, […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/u-s-needs-eu-more-than-expected/

data.title: Bitcoin to test all-time high ‘quickly’ if bulls reclaim $118K: Trader
data.description:
Bitcoin has a new key resistance zone to flip back to support as Fed rate-cut reactions continue to play out in crypto bulls' favor
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/bitcoin-test-all-time-high-quickly-if-bulls-reclaim-118k?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: The Royal Government of Bhutan transferred 343.1 BTC, worth approximately $40 million
data.description: According to Onchain Lens, the Royal Government of Bhutan has transferred 343.1 bitcoins (approximately $40.18 million) to a new wallet and is expected to deposit the funds into a CEX as usual.

data.title: Orderly launches Solana ecosystem multi-collateralization feature, supporting SOL and USDT margin
data.description: Liquidity infrastructure provider Orderly has launched multi-collateral functionality on Solana. Users can now use SOL and USDT as trading margin.

data.title: MGBX will soon launch BARD (Lombard) spot trading
data.description: According to official news, MGBX will launch BARD (Lombard) spot trading at 7:30 PM (SGT) on September 18, 2025. Deposits will open at 7:00 PM (SGT) on September 18, 2025. Trading will open at 7:30 PM (SGT) on September 18, 2025. Withdrawals will open at 7:00 PM (SGT) on September 21, 2025. Lombard is a decentralized finance project that aims to transform the use of Bitcoin through liquid, staked Bitcoin tokens like LBTC, promoting yield farming and DeFi participation.

data.title: Coinbase Payments Joins Open Intents Framework as Core Contributor for Ethereum Cross-Chain Standards
data.description:
Coinbase Payments joined the Open Intents Framework as a core contributor to standardize cross-chain asset movement within Ethereum's ecosystem, collaborating with Ethereum Foundation, Hyperlane, and OpenZeppelin to address growing fragmentation and $21 billion in cross-chain crime.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/coinbase-payments-joins-open-intents-framework-as-core-contributor-for-ethereum-cross-chain-standards/

data.title: Ethereum Price Movements Could Trigger Significant Liquidations
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, data from Coinglass indicates that if Ethereum surpasses $4,700, the cumulative liquidation intensity of short positions on major centralized exchanges (CEX) will reach $1.186 billion. Conversely, if Ethereum falls below $4,500, the cumulative liquidation intensity of long positions on these exchanges will amount to $1.023 billion.

BlockBeats notes that the liquidation chart does not precisely display the number of contracts pending liquidation or the exact value of liquidated contracts. Instead, the chart's bars represent the relative importance of each liquidation cluster compared to nearby clusters, indicating intensity.

Therefore, the chart illustrates the extent to which the asset price reaching a certain level will be affected. A higher "liquidation bar" suggests that once the price reaches that level, there will be a stronger reaction due to a wave of liquidity.

data.title: Binance Wallet BuildKey TGE Event Launches First Phase on River
data.description: Binance Wallet will exclusively launch the Aspecta BuildKey token sale (TGE), featuring Riverdot Inc (RIVER). Users will need to use Binance Alpha Points to participate in the BuildKey subscription. The subscription period will be from 3:00 PM to 5:00 PM on September 19th, and trading will be from 5:00 PM on September 19th to 5:00 PM on September 22nd. The TGE and BuildKey exchange will be available at 5:00 PM on September 22nd. Note: Token prices will fluctuate dynamically based on the Bonding Curve. The liquidity pool will remain stable for a period of time after the TGE, and liquidity may decline. Exchanges will remain available at any time.

data.title: Dora Vota node collection is launched on aMACI operation service
data.description: All new nodes on Dora Factory's decentralized governance blockchain, Dora Vota, have launched the anonymous MACI (aMACI) protocol operator service (aMACI Operator Service). This service is understood to play a vital role as the core infrastructure of decentralized governance.

data.title: Binance Wallet to Launch 38th Exclusive TGE, Featuring Jojoworld (JOJO)
data.description: Binance announced on X that Binance Wallet will launch the 38th Exclusive TGE with Jojoworld (JOJO) via PancakeSwap.Subscription period: September 19, 2025, 09:00 to 11:00 (UTC)Eligible users need to use Binance Alpha Points to participate.An additional 32,000,000 JOJO will be allocated for upcoming campaigns, with details to be announced. TGE details and the Event Portal will be released soon.
